title: cyperus asconeglectus
intro: Cyperus asconeglectus is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Cyperus asconeglectus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
